title: A cigar-shaped UFO spotted in a pendulum-like motion over Canoas [2001]
excerpt: MARCH 5th, 2001. Time: 11:50 am. Duration: 30 seconds. A cigar-shaped UFO was spotted by an airline pilot during a TAM flight, at the Canoas Airport, in Canoas, State of Rio Grande do Sul. The unknown white object “was long and cylindrical” with the “size of a Boeing 737 “e” hovered doing a pendulum motion […]
text_preview:
MARCH 5th, 2001. Time: 11:50 am. Duration: 30 seconds. A cigar-shaped UFO was spotted by an airline pilot during a TAM flight, at the Canoas Airport, in Canoas, State of Rio Grande do Sul. The unknown white object “was long and cylindrical” with the “size of a Boeing 737 “e” hovered doing a pendulum motion at an altitude of 2,000ft in the East position in relation to the observer. The UFO was observed with the naked eye and under good visibility conditions for 30 seconds by the airline pilot.

According to the witness’ report to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] it was the “first
summary: On 5 Mar 2001, a TAM airline pilot at Canoas Airport observed a Boeing-737-sized white cylindrical UFO performing pendulum-like motion at 2,000 ft for 30 seconds.
